aiGuidance.purpose: Use to express what a repository exists to do or achieve. The statement field is the primary, required field. The title field is optional and intended for constrained UI contexts.

description: A Tier-2 typed record capturing the purpose or mission of a repository. Always available in every conforming SRS repository via the implicit core base package (RFC-018). identityInstanceId on the root container MUST reference a record of this type.
name: purpose
